_source: LANE D web research 2026-06-13: canonical 銀河英雄伝説 character set + appearance identity evidence for portrait matching. NO GUESSING — every appearance value cited to a source URL. Where a source does not state hair/eye colour, value is null with a note. ACDB hair/eye fields reflect the 1988 OVA anime render palette (stylised: e.g. Yang's near-black hair indexed 'Blue', Julian's light-brown indexed 'Gray', Annerose's eyes 'Red'). Gineipaedia gives canon hard facts (rank/birth/death/nickname/flagship) but sparse appearance prose.

_sources.ja_wikipedia_chars: https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/銀河英雄伝説の登場人物
_sources.ja_wikipedia_others: https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/銀河英雄伝説の登場人物・その他
_sources.acdb: https://www.animecharactersdatabase.com/ (source: Legend of the Galactic Heroes, allchars id=100167)

_roster_cross_check.our_roster_nature: VII in-game duty roster: fleet commanders / patrol-squadron commanders / cabinet officials. Civilians, non-officer canon principals and third-power figures are NOT present.
majors_present_in_our_roster: Reinhard (ローエングラム/ミューゼル)
majors_MISSING_from_our_roster: Wittenfeld — NOTE: 'Wittenfeld' in the Lane-D brief is the SAME person as Bittenfeld (ビッテンフェルト); both are romanizations of the one admiral. Bittenfeld IS present. There is no separate Wittenfeld.
Julian Mintz (ユリアン) — protagonist-tier, non-admiral aide; absent
Frederica Greenhill (フレデリカ) — Yang's aide/wife; absent (only her father D.Greenhill present)
Hildegard von Mariendorf (ヒルダ) — Reinhard's chief advisor/empress; absent
Annerose von Grünewald (アンネローゼ) — Reinhard's sister; absent
Rubinsky (ルビンスキー) — Phezzan Landesherr; absent (no Phezzan civilians in roster)
de Villiers (ド・ヴィリエ) — Earth Cult; absent
Grand Bishop / 総大主教 — Earth Cult; absent
Kesselrink (ケッセルリンク), Dominique (ドミニク) — Phezzan; absent
Trünicht IS present (トリューニヒト) as politician
_roster_cross_check.note: Gaps are entirely civilians / third-power (Phezzan, Earth Cult) / non-officer principals — consistent with the roster being a military+cabinet duty list. The Empire/Alliance ADMIRAL coverage is essentially complete.

characters.name_ja: ラインハルト・フォン・ローエングラム
characters.role: Imperial fleet commander -> Imperial Prime Minister -> Kaiser (founder of the Lohengramm/New Galactic Empire). Born Reinhard von Müsel.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Blonde / Yellow', wavy, to-ears length. Eyes: Blue. Build: handsome young man. Nicknames 'Golden Lion' (allies) / 'blond brat' (enemies). Born 14 March 776 UC, died 26 July 801 UC at age 25.
characters.reliability: high (ACDB structured field + Gineipaedia dates)

characters.name_ja: ジークフリート・キルヒアイス
characters.role: Reinhard's childhood best friend and right hand; High Admiral (posthumously Fleet Admiral). Flagship Barbarossa.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Red', to-ears length. Eyes: 'Blue'. Tall. Male teen/young adult. Born 14 Jan 467 IC (776 UC), died 9 Sep 488 IC (797 UC).
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: ウォルフガング・ミッターマイヤー
characters.role: 'Gale Wolf'; Fleet Admiral, Chief Commander of the Space Fleet. Flagship Beowulf. Born 30 Aug 768 UC; admiral in his twenties.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Blonde / Yellow' with 'hair intakes'. Eyes: Blue.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: オスカー・フォン・ロイエンタール
characters.role: Fleet Admiral, Chief of High Command Office, Governor-General of former Alliance worlds. Born 767 UC, died 800 UC (~33).
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Black'. Eyes: HETEROCHROMIA — left eye blue, right eye brown/red (ACDB: Blue (Red), tag 'heterochromia'). Nicknamed 'Bewitching Eyes'. This is his single strongest identity marker.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: パウル・フォン・オーベルシュタイン
characters.role: Reinhard's strategist; Minister of Military Affairs (Secretary of the Navy). Cold, calculating.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Brown' with a 'hair streak'. Eyes: ACDB 'Black'; canon — ARTIFICIAL prosthetic eyes (clear/pale blue in the OVA; light brown in the novels). The artificial eyes are his identity marker.
characters.reliability: high (hair/eye ACDB; artificial-eye fact widely sourced)

characters.name_ja: フリッツ・ヨーゼフ・ビッテンフェルト
characters.role: High Admiral, commander of the 'Schwarz Lanzenreiter' (Black Lancers). Fiery temper, aggressive frontal tactics. Flagship Königs Tiger. Born 767 UC. ALSO romanized 'Wittenfeld'.
characters.appearance: Hair colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null). Canon/OVA: long orange-red hair tied back — widely depicted but not confirmed in a fetched citable field here. Personality 'fiery temper and aggressive battle tactics'.
characters.reliability: medium (role/temperament cited; hair colour unconfirmed — left null, OVA orange-red noted as unverified)

characters.name_ja: アダルベルト・フォン・ファーレンハイト
characters.role: Admiral; noble who joined the military to make a living despite noble status; defected to Reinhard. KIA at the Battle of the Corridor.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role only; appearance unconfirmed -> null)

characters.name_ja: エルネスト・メックリンガー
characters.role: 'The Artist Admiral'; Fleet Admiral, rear-area commander; patron of the arts, painter/pianist; later writes the official history.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null). Identity cue: associated with art (paintings/piano), moustache in OVA (unverified here).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role/epithet cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: ウルリッヒ・ケスラー
characters.role: High Admiral; Chief of the Imperial Military Police, then Capital Defense Commander protecting the Imperial Capital. Born 762 UC.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: ナイトハルト・ミュラー
characters.role: 'Iron Wall' Müller; High Admiral, renowned for defensive resilience (survived Iserlohn, Vermilion). Born 771 UC — among the youngest of Reinhard's admirals.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (epithet/role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: アウグスト・ザムエル・ワーレン
characters.role: Fleet Admiral; loyal, steady commander; loses an arm and continues to serve.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null). Identity cue: prosthetic arm after injury (canon, unverified-field here).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: コルネリアス・ルッツ
characters.role: High Admiral; commander present at the defense of the Imperial capital / Reinhard's guard. KIA defending against Earth-Cult terrorists.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: ヘルムート・レンネンカンプ
characters.role: High Admiral; later High Commissioner to the occupied Alliance; commits suicide after a political blunder (Yang's arrest).
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: カール・ロベルト・シュタインメッツ
characters.role: High Admiral; front-line fleet commander; KIA at the Battle of the Corridor.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: カール・グスタフ・ケンプ
characters.role: Admiral; commander at the assault on Iserlohn (Geiersburg mobile fortress); KIA ramming Iserlohn.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (role cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: エルンスト・フォン・アイゼナッハ
characters.role: Fleet Admiral; 'the Silent Admiral' — famously commands almost entirely by hand-gesture, rarely speaks.
characters.appearance: Hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched sources (null). Identity cue: silence / gesture-commands (behavioural, not visual).
characters.reliability: low for appearance (epithet cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: ウィリバルト・ヨアヒム・フォン・メルカッツ
characters.role: Veteran Imperial High Admiral; defects to the Alliance after the Lippstadt War; serves the exiled legitimate Imperial government; chief of staff of the El Facil Revolutionary Reserve. Born 738 UC, KIA at the Battle of Shiva 801 UC aged 63.
characters.appearance: Described as elderly/aging — 'the only elderly commander who fought in the fleet battle'. Specific hair/eye colour NOT stated (null). Identity cue: oldest of the admirals, veteran bearing.
characters.reliability: medium (age/elderly cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: ヒルデガルド・フォン・マリーンドルフ
characters.role: 'Fräulein Hilda'; Reinhard's chief advisor/aide, later his wife and Empress; daughter of Count Mariendorf. MISSING from our 97-roster.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Blonde / Yellow' (short). Eyes: Blue. Tags: cravat, jewel. Wears a male-style aide uniform.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: アンネローゼ・フォン・グリューネワルト
characters.role: Reinhard's older sister; former concubine of Kaiser Friedrich IV (Countess von Grünewald); the cause of Reinhard's ambition. MISSING from our 97-roster.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Blonde / Yellow', wavy, long. Eyes: 'Red' (OVA render). Tag: dress. Strong visual resemblance to Reinhard (golden hair).
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: ヤン・ウェンリー
characters.role: Alliance's foremost strategist; Fleet Admiral (youngest in Alliance history, age 32). 'Miracle Yang', 'Hero of El Facil', 'Magician'. Born 4 Apr 767 UC, died 1 Jun 800 UC at 33 (assassinated by Terraists).
characters.appearance: Hair: ACDB 'Blue' (i.e. the OVA's near-black dark hair rendered blue-black), messy. Eyes: 'Black'. Identity cues: black beret, perpetually rumpled uniform, young scruffy historian-soldier look.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: ユリアン・ミンツ
characters.role: Yang's ward/adopted son and aide; later commander of the Yang Fleet and the Iserlohn Republic forces. MISSING from our 97-roster.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Gray' (ACDB; light ash-brown in OVA) with 'cheek curls'. Eyes: 'Black'. Identity cues: beret, youthful (teens).
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: フレデリカ・グリーンヒル
characters.role: Yang's aide-de-camp and later wife; salutatorian of the FPA officer academy; daughter of Admiral Dwight Greenhill. MISSING from our 97-roster (only her father is present).
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Brown' (shoulder-length). Eyes: 'Brown'. Wears glasses (canon, OVA). Female officer uniform.
characters.reliability: high (hair/eye ACDB; glasses canon)

characters.name_ja: ワルター・フォン・シェーンコップ
characters.role: Vice Admiral; commander of the Rosen Ritter (armoured-grenadier regiment of Imperial defectors); ground-warfare expert; noted ladies' man.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Brown' with 'sideburns'. Eyes: 'Brown'. Identity cues: rugged, sideburns, beret-and-cape Rosen Ritter look.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: ダスティ・アッテンボロー
characters.role: Rear Admiral in the Yang Fleet; Yang's academy junior; witty, journalist-minded.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Gray'. Eyes: 'Black'. Tags: beret, 'freckles'. Identity cues: freckles + beret.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: アレックス・キャゼルヌ
characters.role: Rear Admiral; Yang's logistics/administration genius and academy senior; quartermaster of the Yang Fleet. (Our roster: キャゼルヌ / Caselnes.)
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Brown'. Eyes: 'Blue'. Tag: uniform. Identity cue: moustache (canon OVA, unverified-field).
characters.reliability: high (hair/eye ACDB)

characters.name_ja: オリビエ・ポプラン
characters.role: Ace fighter (spartanian) pilot of the Yang Fleet; womanizer; comic-relief skilled aviator.
characters.appearance: Hair: 'Orange'. Eyes: 'Green'. Tags: beret, scarf. Identity cues: orange hair + pilot scarf.
characters.reliability: high

characters.name_ja: アレクサンドル・ビュコック
characters.role: Fleet Admiral, Commander-in-Chief of the Alliance Space Fleet; veteran of 40+ years; mentor to Yang. Born 726 UC, KIA 800 UC at age 74.
characters.appearance: Elderly veteran (74). Specific hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched source (null). Identity cue: oldest Alliance commander, white-haired in OVA (unverified-field).
characters.reliability: medium (age cited; colours -> null)

characters.name_ja: アドリアン・ルビンスキー
characters.role: Fifth Landesherr (ruler) of the Dominion of Fezzan; 'Black Fox of Fezzan'; master manipulator playing Empire and Alliance against each other; secretly entangled with the Earth Cult. MISSING from our 97-roster.
characters.appearance: Specific hair/eye colour NOT stated in fetched source (null). Identity cue: canonically BALD (OVA) — widely known but not in a fetched citable field; left as note, not asserted.
characters.reliability: medium (role/epithet cited; appearance -> null, bald noted unverified)
